title: SCP-999, Tickle Monster
description: A friendly entity which heals and protect the player
body:
The Tickle Monster adds a new friendly creature. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-999, also known as The Tickle Monster.


SCP-999 is a gelatinous, orange slime-like creature that is kind and loves all beings. If the player holds Glow Berries or Sweet Berries, SCP-999 will happily follow them around. Interacting with SCP-999 causes it to rejoice, granting the player a Regeneration effect. In its presence, players can also gain the Luck effect, but also Nausea when colliding with SCP-999. SCP-999 is protective of the player and will attack hostile mobs to defend them. 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-999 spawn?

SCP-999 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-999.

</details>



![SCP-999](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c159e43dddde40b85ff590d3a768a5612009920e.png)

SCP-999 is a friendly, orange slime-like creature that loves interacting with players. When players interact with it, SCP-999 will happily grant them the Regeneration effect. In its presence, players can also gain the Luck effect. However, players may get Nausea if they collide with it. SCP-999 will follow players when holding Glow Berries or Sweet Berries and protects them by attacking hostile mobs. If you give SCP-999 Glow Berries or Sweet Berries, it will dance and grant the player high regeneration

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
